request.description: Login as platform admin (seeded from .env via npm run seed:admin).
Login as moderator (created via Admin > Create Privileged User).

request.description: Admin-only direct creation of MODERATOR or ADMIN. Requires Authorization: Bearer {{adminToken}} (run Login Admin first and copy accessToken into the adminToken collection variable). Argon2 password hash + audit log.
